Metadata.description: Explore Gabriel Antoine's developer portfolio, showcasing creative projects, work experiences, and educational background.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Idea? Questions? Challenges? Let's work together!
Contact.description: You can reach out to me either by email at <email></email> or by filling out the form below.

Hero.description: Hi! 👋 I'm a {age}-year-old Belgian developer based in Liège. I build fast, accessible and scalable web applications, with a strong focus on clean code principles, while also exploring other kinds of projects!
Hero.scroll-down-button-label: Scroll down to the site content

twoutter.name: Twoutter
twoutter.description: A full stack web application recreating core Twitter features using modern web technologies and a mobile-first responsive UI
twoutter.thumbnailAlt: A preview of Twoutter's responsiveness by showing the dekstop and mobile versions side by side

mario-luigi.name: Mario & Luigi Game
mario-luigi.description: A recreation of a mini-game from Mario & Luigi: Bowser's Inside Story released on Nintendo DS in 2009, using only vanilla JavaScript and the native Canvas 2D API
mario-luigi.thumbnailAlt: A preview of The Mario & Luigi game showing shells falling on the left-hand side and Mario and Luigi in big on the right-hand side

sitytrip.name: SityTrip
sitytrip.description: A cartographic web application, developed in collaboration with Geolives Belgium SRL, serving as a tour guide for city-trips, as part of my final-year project at HEPL
sitytrip.thumbnailAlt: A preview of several points of interest drawn on the map of the SityTrip website.

crypto-cpp.name: Cryptography in C++
crypto-cpp.description: A C++ and CMake library featuring implementations of well-known cryptographic algorithms such as AES/GCM, by using advanced C++ features such as C++20 "concepts"
crypto-cpp.thumbnailAlt: A preview of the cryptographic library's code showing part of the AES implementation

green-house.name: Green House
green-house.description: A recreation of the Nintendo Game & Watch title Green House (1982), built in C (POSIX) as part of an introductory course on multithreading
green-house.thumbnailAlt: A preview of the Green House game showing the character, Stanley, killing a bug with an insecticide.

sleep-app.name: Sleep application
sleep-app.description: A mobile application to help users maintain consistent sleep schedules with gamification features, made with Flutter and Firebase
sleep-app.thumbnailAlt: A preview of the mobile application to improve sleep habits showing the three main screens. From left to right: The screen to set their sleep schedule, the screen to go to sleep and the profile and statistics screen.

bachelor.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Specialization in Application Development

geolives.title: Frontend Web Development Intern
geolives.description: Frontend-focused internship on SityTrip, a modern web-based tourist guide, involving the design and development of a cartographic interface with interactive MapLibre maps and dynamic point-of-interest streaming via a REST API, built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Joy UI. The work primarily focused on frontend architecture, global state management, multilingual support across six languages, AI-driven data integration, third-party API integration (Tiqets), and performance and SEO optimization through SSR and SSG strategies in Next.js, with limited contribution to backend Java development using Hibernate.

content.thank-you: Thank you for your message via {site}. I will get back to you as soon as possible.
content.copy: Here is a copy of what you sent:
